name_en: ➫ SPEEDY 20 Series #M45957# SP Uninspected Version Exclusive YY#
name_cn:
➫ SPEEDY 20 Series #M45957# SP Uninspected Version Exclusive YY#
🔘Size: 20*13*12cm
As a Speedy series, it is a classic flagship of the Little Pony family. It has always been a favorite of the Speedy family. The new Speedy model is eye-catching. The detachable wide shoulder strap design gives it a fresh and unique look! As a new member of the Speedy family, this size is more perfect! It is another out-of-stock hit with stunning looks. Compared to the Nano size, it is more suitable for daily use. A must-have to add to your collection, it looks amazing!!
